failingTest: None yet — new module with green-field tests (issue #48)
fixApproach: Create three pure-function utility files in a new `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/` directory, each exporting a single named function with JSDoc, following the existing `chunk-text.ts` pattern (no imports, single export, JSDoc). Add a barrel `index.ts` re-exporting all three. Add a co-located `index.test.ts` Vitest suite covering all acceptance criteria: empty/whitespace-only inputs, normalization collapses, word counting, truncation with ellipsis only when words are dropped, and the maxWords invariant.
steps: Create `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/normalize-text.ts` — export `normalizeText(text: string): string` collapsing all whitespace runs to single space and trimming
Create `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/word-count.ts` — export `wordCount(text: string): number` counting whitespace-separated tokens on normalized text
Create `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/truncate-words.ts` — export `truncateWords(text: string, maxWords: number): string` keeping first maxWords words, appending `…` only when truncation occurs
Create `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/index.ts` — barrel re-export of all three functions
Create `apps/web/src/lib/text-utilities/index.test.ts` — Vitest suite covering all edge cases from acceptance criteria
Run `npm run build:web` to confirm no compilation or bundling errors
Run `npm run test` to confirm all tests pass including the new suite
summary: Add a text-utilities module (normalizeText, wordCount, truncateWords) under apps/web/src/lib with barrel export and Vitest suite
verificationCommand: npm run build:web && npm run test
